title: Anime Action Hero Pose
summary: Dynamic anime hero - sword drawn mid-leap, sparks, dramatic speed lines, sunset sky.
prompt: A dynamic anime action-hero illustration: a young protagonist with a windswept silver coat mid-leap, drawing a glowing katana through the air, golden energy sparks trailing from the blade, dramatic speed lines radiating from the action. Vivid sunset sky with magenta clouds and a single moon. Bold cel-shaded modern Japanese animation style with vibrant color blocking and clean ink lines. Cinematic low-angle composition. Square 1:1.
